name: pnpm
description: Node.js package manager with strict dependency resolution. Use when running pnpm specific commands, configuring workspaces, or managing dependencies with catalogs, patches, or overrides.

interface.shortDescription: Node.js package manager with strict dependency resolution
interface.longDescription: Node.js package manager with strict dependency resolution. Use when running pnpm specific commands, configuring workspaces, or managing dependencies with catalogs, patches, or overrides.
defaultPrompt: Help me use Pnpm for my current task.
